Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: The radar contact has now been revealed as a QST-35 SEPTAR target drone. Lets try engaging this target with our SM-1MR Standard missiles. This is a medium-range surface-to-air missile (SAM) with a secondary anti-surface mode for line of sight engagement.
This missile is the main armament of the Perry class frigate. Lets get familiar with how to use it against surface targets. The same principles will apply to air targets as well.
Click on the SM-1MR icon on the bottom bar to select it, then mouse over the Tactical Display to select a target.
